title: Onboarding - Translations
scenario: Onboarding flow text is not properly translated or displayed for supported languages in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on a fresh install (or clear app data).
2. Observe the Onboarding flow screens (Welcome, Permissions, Device Setup, etc.).
3. For each supported language: change the device system language to the target language, then re-launch the app and go through the entire Onboarding flow.
4. Check all text elements on each Onboarding screen (titles, descriptions, buttons, tooltips, error messages, etc.).
5. Verify that no text is truncated, overlapping, misaligned, or showing untranslated placeholders (e.g., English strings, "[untranslated]", or raw resource IDs).
expected: All text in the Onboarding flow is fully translated, properly displayed, and fits within UI elements without truncation or overlap for every supported language.
